Write a short love poem and read it aloud! 📜
Blow a kiss to every player in the room! 😘

Give a 30-second speech on why love is amazing. 🎤

Let the group choose a contact for you to send a heart emoji to. ❤️

Try to charm a household object. 🏺
Act like you just won a beauty pageant. 👑

Confess who you think is the best looking in the room. 🤭
Say 'I love you' to an inanimate object with feeling. 🛋️

Act like a swooning fan meeting a celebrity. 🤩
Do 10 jumping jacks while shouting 'I am attractive!'. 🤸

Act like a puppy wanting attention. 🐕
